prompt: Generate the corresponding video game screenshot in a driver view.
searchQueryGenerated: High quality video game gameplay screenshot detail
prompt_refined: Generate a video game screenshot depicting a city driving scene from a third-person driver's view, similar in style and composition to image 1. The image should prominently feature a red sports car in the foreground, with other vehicles like a black police car visible on a city street lined with tall buildings under a clear sky. Essential game user interface (UI) elements must be present: a speedometer in the top-right corner, a steering wheel overlay in the bottom-center, pedal icons in the bottom-right corner, and a vertical progress bar on the left side, along with a prominent blue directional arrow on the road ahead.
objects: red sports car in the foreground
steering wheel overlay in the bottom-center
pedal icons in the bottom-right corner
vertical progress bar on the left side
prominent blue directional arrow on the road ahead
